expectations.text: States that the domain (service) must not name PostgresClient directly
expectations.evidence: "high-level policy (services) and the abstractions they consume (repository interfaces) must not depend on low-level details"

expectations.text: Distinguishes domain-owned interface from infrastructure implementation
expectations.evidence: "The service receives the repository interface, never the client"

expectations.text: Places new PostgresClient(...) at the composition root
Mentions 'crossing the curve' or directional inversion
expectations.evidence: Has a dependency-direction diagram showing the inversion concept and says 'push the new to the edge', but does not name 'crossing the curve' or the source-deps-vs-control-flow opposition explicitly. Half credit.
